# Feature Development Flow

For EVERY new feature:

1. Create model (entity)
2. Create repository
3. Create service
4. Create controller
5. Create UI (FXML + controller)

## Rules
- Do NOT skip layers
- Do NOT create unused classes
- Deliver working feature end-to-end

## Output expectation
Each feature must:
- Persist data
- Be usable via UI
- Follow architecture rules

## Simplicity
- No generic frameworks
- No abstractions unless necessary
